name: smartsoko
description: Smart Soko — Hyperlocal marketplace for Kenya

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd server && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.docker:prod:migrate: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml exec server npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker:prod:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml exec server node prisma/seed.js
